title: Lunar Fps
description: Lunar Fps is a lightweight and fully-optimized PvP/Fps Boost Modpack designed to work perfectly alongside Lunar Client.
body:
# 🌙 Lunar Fps

A lightweight, high-performance PvP modpack fully compatible with **Lunar Client**.
---

## ✨Features

*  Compatible with Lunar Client (no conflicts, no crashes)
*  Includes the Mace PvP Map by Tottles
*  Maralow Crystal Optimizer built-in
*  Crystal PvP FPS boost
*  Better hit reg visuals
*  Smooth movement & stable frame times
*  Clean, minimal look
*  Ultra-lightweight for low-end devices
*  Plug-and-play setup — nothing extra needed

---

## ⚡Performance

* Render & particle optimization
* Chunk performance improvements
* Crystal lag reduction
* Lower input delay
* Stable frame times

Great for:

* Sword PvP
* Crystal PvP
* Duels
* Lifesteal & competitive servers
* pvp stuff's

---

## 🌑Why LUNAR PVP?

* Fast
* Clean
* High FPS
* Simple
* PvP-focused
* Lunar-friendly

---

## ❗Notice

Not affiliated with Lunar Client.
Made as an independent, compatible PvP & performance modpack.

---
